message: Starting implementation of DragView and InputView. Explored all dependent types: CardView, PileView, BoardView, CardAnimator, InputConfig, AnimationConfig, MoveValidationSystem, MoveExecutionSystem, and all models/enums.

Completed P7.T8: InputView and DragView implemented. Files: Assets/Scripts/Views/Input/InputView.cs, Assets/Scripts/Views/Input/DragView.cs. Also made BoardView.GetPileView and GetCardView public (required by InputView). All acceptance criteria met: Pointer API used, drag threshold, full drag-drop lifecycle, tap-to-move, double-tap to foundation, stock tap, sorting layers, phase gating, OnEnable/OnDisable state management.
